title: Bridge Essay: The Self and Its Prolonged Intrinsic Neural Timescale in Schizophrenia.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Nondual/Unity** (Phase 16) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Nondual/Unity to mechanistic neuroscience through The, Self, and, Its, Prolonged.

**The Self and Its Prolonged Intrinsic Neural Timescale in Schizophrenia.** — Schizophr Bull. PMID: 32614395. DOI: 10.1093/schbul/sbaa083. Schizophrenia (SCZ) can be characterized as abasic self-disorder that is featured by abnormal temporal integration on phenomenological (experience) and psychological (information processing) levels. Temporal integration on the neuronal level can be measured by the brain'sintrinsic neural timescale using the autocorrelation window (ACW) and power-law exponent (PLE).
